recentTweets.text:
Thankful for the legendary life, leadership and legacy of the great John Lewis.

The right to vote is sacred to the integrity of our democracy.

We will never yield it.
 https://t.co/2I58BMqAAh

Donald Trump is a feeble, unhinged conspiracy-peddling 80-year old failed President.

The economy is a disaster under this guy and the American people know it.

Pathetic.
https://t.co/Xv4ClE4Eb3

We will not let Donald Trump and Republican extremists steal this election.

Regime change is coming to Congress in November.

For The People.

Todd Blanche is Donald Trump’s personal attorney who:

1. Created the corrupt $1.8 billion slush fund.

2. Weaponized the Department of Justice to persecute Americans.

3. Presided over a massive cover-up.

He is deeply unfit to serve as Attorney General. Reject him.

ICE agents who break the law must be criminally investigated and should be criminally prosecuted.

Every single perpetrator must be held accountable.
https://t.co/RGJiR6rbpE

There is an affordability crisis in America, so what are Republicans up to this week? 

Trying to jam a bloated war budget down the throats of the American people.

Unacceptable.

Gas prices are out of control. 

More than $100 billion in taxpayer money has been wasted in a reckless war of choice.

Operation Epic Failure in Iran has been a disaster.

Republicans would rather make it harder to vote than easier to afford a home.

When people show you who they are, believe them. https://t.co/7GNL3p1jv5

Every single ICE agent involved in the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo must be investigated to the full extent of the law.

Video footage of the killing must be released immediately.

The American people deserve the truth, the whole truth and nothing but the truth.

Gas prices are surging because of Donald Trump’s reckless war of choice.

The Republican economy is a complete mess.

You deserve better.

The so-called ceasefire in the Middle East has collapsed.

Again.

Donald Trump’s reckless war of choice in Iran has been a disaster.

Donald Trump is demanding that Congress give his war machine another $350 billion.

The reckless war of choice in Iran has increased gas prices and been a disaster for the American people.

Get lost.

White Supremacists shamefully marched through our nation’s capital on July 4th.

These extremists think they can behave with impunity.

We will eradicate this cancer in America and preserve our multiracial democracy.

The mass shooting in Coney Island last night shocks the conscience.

Praying hard for the children who were injured and all of the victims.

We must crush the scourge of gun violence in New York City and throughout the nation.

Once and for all.

Happy Independence Day!!!

#America250 https://t.co/PtC3nQNdAG

They just took the defending cha…

Donald Trump made more than $2 billion during his first year as President.

Republicans are enriching themselves while making your life more expensive.

We must crush the culture of corruption.
Thank you @CongBoyle for hosting a bipartisan House delegation to celebrate the birth of our democracy! https://t.co/aRLIQNpqkf

The House is holding a special session at the site of the Continental Congress in Philadelphia.

There are no Kings in the United States.

Congress must always work for the American people. https://t.co/906wFphLq0

Big day for Team USA.

Let’s do this!

🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸⚽️⚽️⚽️

Birthright citizenship remains the law of the land.

Out of many, one! https://t.co/cH7NyQfwWy
https://t.co/83ISe1xDAQ

He is having a complete meltdown.

The reckless war of choice in Iran has been a disaster for the American people.

They don’t give a damn about you.

Meanwhile.

Happy Heavenly Father’s Day Dad!

Miss you much 👑❤️🕊️ https://t.co/Fc7BNsBfsZ

Costs are up, consumer confidence in the economy is down and the reckless war of choice in Iran has been a disaster.

You deserve better.

Liberty and justice for all.

The Republican war of choice in the Middle East has been a complete disaster.

Regime change is coming to Congress in November.

Important day in America.

The Obama Presidential Center is opening on the South Side of Chicago.

And New York City is holding a Knicks championship parade for the first time in 53 years.

Star Cape Verdean goalkeeper Vozinha and his mother will be reunited in Miami in time for the match on Sunday.

Thank you to Secretary Rubio, U.S. State Department officials, the government of Cabo Verde and FIFA for working together to make this happen. https://t.co/JaWpSQuzb2

Republicans have spent more than $300 million of your taxpayer money to build a ballroom.

The extremists won’t spend a dime to make your life more affordable.

These people are unfit to govern.

The Cabo Verde national football team shocked Spain on the strength of a historic performance by goalkeeper Vozinha.

His Mom was unable to be there because of visa complications.

No mother should miss the chance to see her child make history.

I have asked Secretary of State

Deeply saddened by the shocking deaths resulting from the B-52 crash at Edwards Air Force Base.

Praying hard for the families and loved ones impacted by this immense tragedy.

May God watch over our brave men and women in uniform.

Nothing about the vile and disgusting attack on Michelle Obama?

These extremists are sick people. https://t.co/BTmVK0mh3S

President Obama built a global coalition that constrained Iran’s nuclear ambitions.

Donald Trump recklessly ripped that agreement up and took us to war.

Now gas prices are soaring, Iran is stronger and America is less safe.

That’s the Trump record. https://t.co/PvDDpbtuiT
New York Stand Up 🔥💙🔥💙🔥💙

MAGA extremists can hang all the tarps they want, but the American people know better.

The presidential graffiti on the Kennedy Center has been removed.

And Republicans can never cover up their failed record on the economy, rising healthcare costs and a reckless war.

The cost of living is out of control.

Everyday Americans can’t thrive and can barely survive.

Enough. https://t.co/UJ5mthEr6b

We continue to oppose Donald Trump’s reckless war of choice.

And any effort by Republicans to put boots on the ground in the Middle East. https://t.co/xyr4pN9ziW
https://t.co/5xaLAgsrbm

Bill Pulte is an unqualified political hack who should not be elevated.

But he will be investigated.

For weaponizing the federal government to unlawfully target Lisa Cook, Tish James and Adam Schiff. https://t.co/NPbGWZfq8y
Just voted HELL NO on the Republican scheme to rip healthcare away from the American people in order to fund ICE brutality. https://t.co/b4WTA9c7Z5

The cost of living is out of control.

What are Republicans focused on this week?

Cutting your Social Security and giving a $70 billion blank check to ICE.

House Democrats are a HELL NO.
https://t.co/hraUDnJAEU

Taxpayer dollars should be used to make life better for everyday Americans.

Republicans want to give ICE a $70 billion blank check to unleash continued brutality on the community.

House Democrats are a Hard NO.

This is Day 100 of the reckless war of choice in Iran.

It’s time for the Republican-controlled Senate to move our war powers resolution. 

So we can end this costly conflict immediately.

Thousands of American heroes died on D-Day to defend freedom and defeat fascism. 

Pete Hegseth should honor and respect their memory.

Not politicize their ultimate sacrifice. 

May God Bless the Greatest Generation on D-Day and every day.

Bill Pulte is not an experienced national security professional.

He is a reckless political hack.

Under no circumstances can this guy be allowed to serve as Acting Director of National Intelligence. https://t.co/y5lukaZ1pA
